text:
The most common arithmetic mistake in this scenario is forgetting to multiply the price by the quantity for each item before summing the results.

```python
def calculate_total_revenue(prices_and_quantities):
    total_revenue = sum(price * quantity for price, quantity in prices_and_quantities)
    return total_revenue

prices_and_quantities = [(10, 3), (5, 4), (20, 1)]
total_revenue = calculate_total_revenue(prices_and_quantities)
print(total_revenue)
```
